title: yayPi Endpoints
description: Defines REST endpoints for one or more entities, including CRUD, auth, rate limiting, pagination, and row-level access rules.

EndpointDef.description: A single endpoint or group of CRUD endpoints for an entity.

path.description: URL path. Use {id} for the record identifier parameter.

entity.description: Entity name this endpoint maps to. Required for CRUD endpoints.

crud.description: Auto-generate standard CRUD operations. Generates routes under path.

handler.description: Plugin handler name for custom endpoints.

middleware.description: Middleware names to apply to this endpoint (must be registered plugins).

spec.description: Set to false to exclude this endpoint from all OpenAPI specs.

AuthRequirement.description: Authentication and authorization requirements for an endpoint.

require.description: Require a valid JWT or API key. Returns 401 if not authenticated.

roles.description: Allowed roles. Returns 403 if the authenticated user's role is not listed.

conditions.description: CEL-lite expressions evaluated against the subject. All must pass.

RateLimitConfig.description: Per-endpoint rate limiting. Overrides the global server rate limit.

burst.description: Maximum burst size above the base rate.

key_by.description: Key used to partition rate limit counters.

RowAccessRule.description: A single row-level access rule. Rules are evaluated in order; first match wins.

when.description: Condition expression or '*' to always match. Uses subject bindings: subject.id, subject.role, subject.email.

filter.description: SQL WHERE fragment injected into the query. Use :subject.id, :subject.role, :subject.email as bind parameters. Empty string means no filter (unrestricted).

allow_filter_by.description: Fields that clients may filter by via query params (e.g. ?status=active).

allow_sort_by.description: Fields that clients may sort by via ?sort=field or ?sort=-field.

default_sort.description: Default sort expression. Prefix with - for descending.

include.description: Relations to eager-load in list responses.

row_access.description: Row-level access rules. Applied as additional WHERE clauses.

style.description: Pagination style. 'cursor' uses opaque cursors; 'offset' uses page/offset with optional total count.

default_limit.description: Default page size when client does not specify limit.

max_limit.description: Maximum page size a client may request.

include_total.description: Run a COUNT(*) query and include meta.total in offset-style responses.

include.description: Relations to eager-load in the response.

row_access.description: Row-level access rules. Request is denied (404) if none match.

before_hooks.description: Plugin hook names to call before the record is created.

after_hooks.description: Plugin hook names to call after the record is created.

bulk.description: Accept an array body to create multiple records in one request.

bulk_max.description: Maximum number of records in a bulk create request.

bulk_error_mode.description: How to handle per-row errors in bulk create. 'abort' rolls back all; 'partial' skips failed rows.

allowed_fields.description: Whitelist of fields the client may update. Omit to allow all non-immutable fields.

row_access.description: Row-level access rules. Request is denied (404) if none match.

soft_delete.description: Override entity-level soft delete. If true, sets deleted_at instead of removing the row.

row_access.description: Row-level access rules. Request is denied (404) if none match.

EndpointSpecRef.description: OpenAPI documentation overrides and per-spec filtering.

names.description: Restrict this endpoint to these spec names. Empty means include in all specs.

summary.description: Short one-line summary for the OpenAPI operation.

description.description: Longer Markdown description for the OpenAPI operation.
